name: pullerbear
description: An extension that notifies the user to do a git pull when they first open the project. It will also explain what they just pulled and warn about any potential errors

pullerbear.fetchIntervalMinutes.description: How often PullerBear checks the remote repository for changes.

pullerbear.commitWindowMinutes.description: Rolling time window, in minutes, used to count incoming commits.

pullerbear.warningCommitThreshold.description: If the number of incoming commits in the rolling window exceeds this value, PullerBear asks for confirmation before summarizing.

pullerbear.hardStopCommitThreshold.description: If the number of incoming commits in the rolling window reaches this value, PullerBear pauses summarization until the time window resets.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
